name: First-touch · cold outreach
subject: H-FARM College × {{entity.name}} — partnership opportunity
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

I'm reaching out from H-FARM College — an innovation campus near Treviso, Italy. We've been following {{entity.name}}'s work in {{entity.focus_areas}}, and there's a strong overlap with the formats we run for international partners.

We operate short, intensive partnerships (1-2 weeks on campus, mixed-cohort) plus longer exchanges and joint degree tracks. Recent example: {{recommended.case}}.

Would you have 20 minutes in the next two weeks for a quick intro call? Happy to send a one-pager beforehand if useful.

Best,
{{sender.name}}
{{sender.role}} · H-FARM College

name: First-touch · referred by someone
subject: Intro · H-FARM College ↔ {{entity.name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

[REFERRER_NAME] suggested I reach out — we were discussing partner schools where the H-FARM model could be a good fit, and {{entity.name}} came up because of your work in {{entity.focus_areas}}.

H-FARM College is an innovation campus near Treviso, Italy. We run short intensive partnerships (1-2 weeks on campus) plus longer exchanges. {{recommended.case}} is one of our active partnerships.

Would you have 20 minutes next week to compare notes? Tuesday 14:00 CET or Thursday 11:00 CET both work for me.

Best,
{{sender.name}}
H-FARM College

name: Follow-up · no reply after 14 days
subject: Re: H-FARM College × {{entity.name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

Just circling back on my note from a couple of weeks ago. No pressure if the timing isn't right.

If it helps narrow the conversation: the most common starting point for partners like {{entity.name}} is our {{recommended.name}} format — {{recommended.duration}} on campus, {{recommended.group}} students. Reference: {{recommended.case}}.

Would a short call this month or next make sense? Or I can send a one-pager if you'd prefer to share internally first.

Best,
{{sender.name}}
H-FARM College

name: Discovery call · scheduling
subject: Intro call — H-FARM × {{entity.name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

Thanks for the reply — looking forward to talking.

For a first 20-30 min call I'd cover:
  · how H-FARM partnerships work in practice (formats, cohort sizes, costs)
  · which formats might fit {{entity.name}}'s {{entity.focus_areas}} programmes best
  · a couple of reference partnerships (e.g. {{recommended.case}})
  · open Q&A

Does one of these work for you?
  · Tuesday 14:00 CET
  · Wednesday 10:00 CET
  · Thursday 16:00 CET

Or send a slot that works and I'll adjust.

Best,
{{sender.name}}

name: Proposal sent · MoU draft
subject: Proposal + MoU draft — H-FARM × {{entity.name}}
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

Following our call, attached are two documents:

  1. A short proposal for the {{recommended.name}} partnership ({{recommended.duration}}, {{recommended.group}} students, key dates).
  2. Our standard MoU template — most academic legal departments accept 80% of the clauses as-is, so it should accelerate review on your side.

Let me know who on your team will handle the legal side and I'll coordinate directly. Aim is to have signature in ~6-8 weeks if that fits your calendar.

Happy to clarify anything in the proposal — just reply.

Best,
{{sender.name}}
H-FARM College

name: Post-meeting · recap + next steps
subject: Recap — {{entity.name}} call
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

Thanks for the call today. Quick recap of what we discussed and the next steps:

What we discussed:
  · [TOPIC_1]
  · [TOPIC_2]

Next steps:
  · From my side: [ACTION_BY_HFARM] — by [DATE]
  · From yours: [ACTION_BY_PARTNER] — by [DATE]
  · Next sync: [DATE_OR_OPEN]

If I've missed or misremembered anything, just reply with corrections.

Best,
{{sender.name}}
H-FARM College

name: Re-warm · dormant 90+ days
subject: {{entity.name}} — quick check-in
body:
Dear {{recipient.firstName}},

It's been a while — I hope the {{entity.country}} semester is going well.

A quick note from H-FARM: [NEW_HOOK — e.g. new partnership format / case study / fellowship opening / event invite]. It seemed relevant to {{entity.name}}'s programmes in {{entity.focus_areas}} so I wanted to flag it.

If the partnership conversation is back on the table on your side, happy to pick it up where we left off. If not, no problem — I'll check in again later in the year.

Best,
{{sender.name}}
H-FARM College
